title: AI Marketing A/B Testing Tools Review: Optimizely vs VWO vs Google Optimize for Small Business - 2026
description: Compare Optimizely, VWO, and Google Optimize AI marketing A/B testing tools for experiment design and data analysis. Find the best marketing testing soluti
content:
Marketing A/B Testing Challenges for Small Businesses

Small businesses need marketing testing: experiment design, data analysis, and conversion optimization. A/B testing tools offer experiment design, data analysis, and conversion optimization.

Core Features Comparison

FeaturesOptimizelyVWOGoogle OptimizeSplitbee
AI FeaturesLimitedLimitedLimitedLimited
Experiment DesignBestStrongMediumMedium
Small Business FriendlyWeakStrongBestBest
Data AnalysisBestStrongStrongMedium
PriceCustom$119$0$0

Optimizely Overview

Optimizely is the A/B testing leader with the best experiment design.

  • Core Capabilities: Suitable for small business, best experiment design, best data analysis, suitable for small business
  • Advantages: Suitable for small business, best experiment design, suitable for small business, comprehensive Features
  • Disadvantages: High barrier for small business, weak small business friendliness, custom pricing required
  • Price: Enterprise custom pricing

VWO Overview

VWO offers A/B testing friendly for small businesses with reasonable pricing.

  • Core Capabilities: Small business friendly, experiment design, data analysis, suitable for small business
  • Advantages: Small business friendly, reasonable pricing, suitable for small business, comprehensive Features
  • Disadvantages: Basic Features, experiment design not as good as Optimizely
  • Price: Growth $119/month

Google Optimize Overview

Google Optimize is most friendly for small businesses and completely free.

  • Core Capabilities: Most friendly for small business, experiment design, data analysis, suitable for small business
  • Advantages: Most friendly for small business, completely free, suitable for small business, Google integration
  • Disadvantages: Basic Features, medium experiment design, service discontinued
  • Price: Completely free (updates discontinued)

Splitbee Overview

Splitbee is most friendly for small businesses and completely free.

  • Core Capabilities: Most friendly for small business, experiment design, data analysis, suitable for small business
  • Advantages: Most friendly for small business, completely free, suitable for small business, simple usability
  • Disadvantages: Basic Features, medium data analysis
  • Price: Completely free

Summary Comparison

ToolSmall Business FriendlyExperiment DesignPriceBest For
OptimizelyWeakBestCustomBest experiments
VWOStrongStrong$119Small business top choice
Google OptimizeBestMediumFreeFree option
SplitbeeBestMediumFreeSuitable for small business

Recommendations

For small businesses, Choose VWO for friendliness. For free option, pick Google Optimize. For best experiments, go with Optimizely. For suitable option, use Splitbee. Combine VWO for top choice with Google Optimize for free option for optimal results.
author: A/B Testing Analyst
